subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one of Abdu'l-Baha! The hope cherished by the peerless Beloved is that this solitary wanderer may abide beneath the sheltering shade of the Glorious Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء امید از دلبر فرید چنان است که آواره وحید در ظل ظلیل رب جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @review of publications, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
